privileged_info_summary: The task requires recording eight vital signs (systolic BP 128 mmHg, diastolic BP 82 mmHg, pulse 76 bpm, temperature 98.6°F, respiration 16/min, oxygen saturation 98%, height 68 inches, weight 185 lbs) into a LibreHealth EHR system using real NHANES patient data (9,375 patients from CDC's National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey). The vital signs values are synthetic test data explicitly specified in the task description, not actual measurements from the NHANES dataset. The verifier checks for correct patient selection, task timing validity, and conformity of entered values to tolerances of ±0.1°F for temperature and ±0.5 units for height/weight measurements.
